steps.title: Find the real subject
steps.content: The subject of the clause is 'The chapter,' which is singular. The phrase 'whose boundaries encompass 83,400 acres' only describes the chapter; the plural noun 'boundaries' does not control the main verb.

steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are plural forms, and Choice C is also a plural past-tense form. A singular present-tense verb is needed to agree with 'The chapter' and complete the sentence naturally. The answer is D.
